chart.title: Nuclear power generation
chart.citation: Ember (2026); Energy Institute - Statistical Review of World Energy (2025)

Electricity from nuclear - TWh.descriptionProcessing: - Electricity data from 2000 onwards (and from 1990 onwards for European countries, including Turkey) comes from Ember. Earlier data comes from the Energy Institute.
